text:
Karissa Schweizer

Karissa Schweizer found just enough kick to finish eighth in her qualifying heat of the 5,000 meters Friday and advance to the final.

The former Mizzou runner stuck with the main pack throughout the first preliminary and fought off her closest challenger with a time of 14:59.64. American Elise Cranny was seventh in 14:58.55.

title: Former Mizzou star Karissa Schweizer reaches Olympic 5,000-meter final | Mizzou Sports | columbiamissourian.com
author: St. Louis Post-Dispatch
description: Schweizer will run in the final Monday at 2:10 p.m. CDT.
